title: senecio cymbalarioides
intro: Senecio cymbalarioides, also known as Blue Devil, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its striking blue flowers and sprawling habit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Senecio cymbalarioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
